segments.text: WOMAN: Hello ... motor insurance department ...
segments.translation: 女：您好……这里是车辆保险部……

segments.text: MAN: Oh hello ... I'd like to ask about insurance for my car.
segments.translation: 男：啊，你好……我想咨询一下我的车险。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, of course. I'll just take a few details.
segments.translation: 女：没问题。我需要了解一些您的信息。

segments.text: What's your name?
segments.translation: 请问您怎么称呼？

segments.text: MAN: Patrick Jones.
segments.translation: 男：帕特里克·琼斯。

segments.text: WOMAN: And your address?
segments.translation: 女：您的住址是？

segments.text: MAN: It's 27 Bank Road.
segments.translation: 男：我住在河岸路27号。

segments.text: WOMAN: 27 Bank Road. Is that in Greendale?
segments.translation: 女：Bank路27号。是在格林戴尔区吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes.
segments.translation: 男：是的。

segments.text: WOMAN: And what's your daytime phone number?
segments.translation: 女：请问您白天能联系到的电话是多少？

segments.text: MAN: My work number is 730453.
segments.translation: 男：我的工作电话是730453.

segments.text: WOMAN: And could I ask what your occupation is?
segments.translation: 女：能麻烦告知一下您的职业吗？

segments.text: MAN: Dentist.
segments.translation: 男：我是一名牙医。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK ... now a few details about your car ... What size is the engine?
segments.translation: 女：好的……现在麻烦提供一下您的车辆信息……您的车引擎排量是多少？

segments.text: MAN: It's 1200 ccs.
segments.translation: 男：1200立方厘米。

segments.text: WOMAN: Thank you ... and the make and model?
segments.translation: 女：谢谢……您的车是什么品牌和型号？

segments.text: MAN: It's a Hewton Sable.
segments.translation: 男：是一辆Hewton Sable。

segments.text: WOMAN: Could you spell the model name please?
segments.translation: 女：能麻烦您拼一下型号吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes ... S-A-B-L-E.
segments.translation: 男：好的……S-A-B-L-E。

segments.text: WOMAN: Ah yes ... thanks. And when was it made?
segments.translation: 女：好的，谢谢。您的车出厂日期是？

segments.text: WOMAN: Lovely ... right ... I presume you've had a previous insurer?
segments.translation: 女：好的……我想您之前应该在别的公司购买过车险吧？

segments.text: MAN: Yes.
segments.translation: 男：是的。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right ... we need to know the name of the company.
segments.translation: 女：好的……我们需要您提供那家公司的名字。

segments.text: MAN: Yes ... it was Northern Star.
segments.translation: 男：好的……是北星公司。

segments.text: WOMAN: Thank you, and have you made any insurance claims in the last five years?
segments.translation: 女：谢谢。那在过去的五年中您申请过理赔吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes ... one in 1999.
segments.translation: 男：是的……在1999年有一次。

segments.text: WOMAN: And what was the problem?
segments.translation: 女：当时是什么问题呢？

segments.text: MAN: It was stolen ... but ...
segments.translation: 男：是我的车被盗了……但是……

segments.text: WOMAN: That's fine, Mr Jones ... that's all we need to know at the moment ...
segments.translation: 女：没关系，琼斯先生……我们现在只需要这些信息……

segments.text: WOMAN: And will there be any other named drivers?
segments.translation: 女：这辆车还有其他人驾驶吗？

segments.text: MAN: Just the one ...
segments.translation: 男：就一个。

segments.text: WOMAN: And his name?
segments.translation: 女：他叫什么名字呢？

segments.text: MAN: Simon Paynter.
segments.translation: 男：西蒙·裴恩特

segments.text: WOMAN: Could you spell the surname please?
segments.translation: 女：您能拼一下他的姓吗？

segments.text: MAN: P-A-Y-N-T-E-R.
segments.translation: 男：P-A-Y-N-T-E-R。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK thank you ... And what relationship is he to you?
segments.translation: 女：好的，谢谢……您和这位先生的关系是？

segments.text: MAN: He's my brother-in-law.
segments.translation: 男：他是我姐夫。

segments.text: WOMAN: And what will you or Mr Paynter be using the car for?
segments.translation: 女：您和裴恩特先生用这辆车一般做什么用途呢？

segments.text: MAN: Well ... mainly for social use ...
segments.translation: 男：这个……主要是社交用途……

segments.text: WOMAN: Social use (murmuring). Will you be using it to travel to work?
segments.translation: 女：社交用途。您上下班会开这辆车吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes ... sometimes.
segments.translation: 男：有时候会。

segments.text: WOMAN: ... Anything else?
segments.translation: 女：还有其他用途吗？

segments.text: MAN: No. That's it ...
segments.translation: 男：没了。就这些。

segments.text: WOMAN: And finally ... when would you like to start the insurance?
segments.translation: 女：最后一个问题……您希望保险什么时候生效呢？

segments.text: MAN: I'll need it from the 31st of January.
segments.translation: 男：从1月31号开始吧。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right ... Mr Jones ... I'm getting a couple of quotes coming up on the computer now ... and the best bet looks like being with a company called Red Flag.
segments.translation: 女：好的……琼斯先生……我现在从电脑上调出了几个公司的报价……看起来红旗公司的方案最合适。

segments.text: MAN: Yeah.
segments.translation: 男：好的。

segments.text: WOMAN: And that comes out at $450 per year ...
segments.translation: 女：这个报价是450美元一年。

segments.text: MAN: Well ... that seems OK ... it's quite a bit lower than I've been paying up to now ...
segments.translation: 男：嗯……还行……比我现在的保险要便宜一些…

segments.text: WOMAN: Great ... so would you like me to go ahead with that?
segments.translation: 女：太棒了…那我就按这个给您办理了？

segments.text: MAN: Sure ... why not?
segments.translation: 男：没问题。

segments.text: WOMAN: How would you like to pay?
segments.translation: 女：您选择什么样的支付方式呢？
